name: Deadwheel Odometry
desc: Odometry implementation using deadwheels/freewheels, rotary encoders, and an IMU sensor for the [Robocon competition](https://robotics.pcampus.edu.np/robocon/2024/).

name: Custom 8-bit RISC Processor
desc: A simple and minimal RISC style custom 8-bit processor using verilog and AMD Vivado.

name: Differenrial Drive Odometry
desc: Odometry system for differential drive robots utilizing motor encoders and IMU sensor data. This implementation is part of my undergraduate [major project's bot firmware](https://github.com/sagarxn/Major_Bot_Firmware).
